dc_description: A narrow paved rural road runs through a wooded area, bordered by dry grass, bushes, wire fencing, and dense trees forming a partial canopy. The view appears to be from a bicycle or motorcycle, with handlebars and a mirror visible at the bottom edge. A triangular road sign stands on the left side of the road, and a small herd of light-colored animals is visible in the distance on or near the roadway.
novel_visual_observations: The road surface shows several darker patched or worn areas near the center and right lane.
The distant animals appear clustered across the road, partially blocking the lane ahead.
rich_context: Via Ronci, Nepi, Viterbo, Lazio, 01036, Italia
